items.caption: A collection of vibrant and colorful superhero icons, each representing a different character or item associated with superhero themes. the icons are arranged in a grid format against a white background, making them easily distinguishable and accessible for design purposes. the characters and items include a male superhero with glasses, a female superhero with a mask, a male superhero with a green mask, a superhero car, a superhero shield, a superhero cape, a superhero mask, a superhero emblem, a superhero belt, a superhero wristband, a superhero helmet, and various other icons.
